task: is_body_allowed_for_status_code in utils.py lists the status codes that must not carry a response body. Review the membership set for the no-body codes in utils.py.
correctness_argument: All three body-prohibited status codes — 204, 205, and 304 — are in the set. RFC 7231 requires 205 Reset Content to carry no body; including it ensures `is_body_allowed_for_status_code` returns False for 205, so FastAPI will not generate a body or Content-Length for those responses.
original_function:
current_status_code = int(status_code)
return not (current_status_code < 200 or current_status_code in {204, 205, 304})
